problem: Why can salamanders regenerate limbs but humans cannot — what gene pathway?
mechanism: Photodynamic therapy targeting specific cell receptors
hypothesis: Photodynamic therapy targeting specific cell receptors may resolve Why can salamanders regenerate limbs but humans cannot — what gene pathway? by activating at the molecular level.

experiment.protocol: Mouse model knockout study with 7 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
